gt_sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM badges AS T1 INNER JOIN users AS T2 ON T1.UserId = T2.Id WHERE T2.DisplayName = 'Emmett' ORDER BY T1.Date DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT b.Name
FROM badges b
JOIN users u ON b.UserId = u.Id
WHERE TRIM(u.DisplayName) = 'Emmett'
ORDER BY b.Date DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: Identify the latest badge awarded to the user with the display name Emmett.
